creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
This builds fine, but leaves zm.conf behind. Can you please modify the
installation so zm.conf.sample is installed with the software, and not
zm.conf? As it is now, it seems no files are patched to take this .sample
file into account at build time.

I've taken care of the Debug.3.gz issue. Let me know if you need any help with the sample fix.

====================<phase 7: make package>====================
===>  Building package for zoneminder-1.25.0_1
tar: lib/perl5/5.12.4/man/man3/ZoneMinder::Debug.3.gz: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: etc/zm.conf.sample: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** Error code 1

Stop in /a/ports/multimedia/zoneminder.
Deleting zoneminder-1.25.0_1
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.4/man/man3/ZoneMinder::Debug.3.gz' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/etc/zm.conf.sample' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package `zoneminder-1.25.0_1'
(perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)

https://redports.org/~jgh/20120228232838-50630-13552/zoneminder-1.25.0_1.log

Thanks,
Jason

-- 
Jason Helfman         | FreeBSD Committer
jgh@FreeBSD.org       | http://people.freebsd.org/~jgh
